svg.title: MMM Analytics Platform — data and model pipeline
svg.desc: Five-microservice data flow: ingestion through pipeline, modelling engine, API gateway, and web dashboard.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the CSV upload validation check?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the raw data store?')
sendPrompt('What outlier and missing-value checks run at ingestion?')
sendPrompt('How does the adstock transformation work?')
sendPrompt('What saturation function does the pipeline apply?')
sendPrompt('What does the feature store contain?')
sendPrompt('How is the Ridge regression model trained?')
sendPrompt('How does the model compute channel ROI?')
sendPrompt('How does the budget optimiser find the best allocation?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the API gateway expose?')
sendPrompt('What does the React dashboard display?')
g.text: React dashboard — ROI charts, budget sliders, export
